programme.title: Travel Quest Ep210: Islands of Palau Guam
programme.desc: Exploring the islands of Palau and Guam includes a submarine view of the ocean wildlife, exploration of the battles of World War II, learning the culture of the locals and snorkeling among thousands of jellyfish. These islands have it all, including one of the most interesting foods Host Bill Ball has ever eaten—fruit bat.

programme.title: Xplash Ep101
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. In this episode we’ll go whitewater kayaking in Canada, BASE Jumping in Idaho, hand-feeding flipping tiger sharks in the Bahamas, and get a close-up view of the adrenalized new sport of canyoning.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep102: Giant Manta Rays of San Benedicto
programme.desc: Giants of San Benedicto features Dr. Robert Rubin and his ground-breaking research of giant Mantas. You'll travel to the remote Socorro Islands off Mexico's Pacific coast and see breath-taking encounters with enormous manta rays.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep101
programme.desc: Liquid Edge kayaks the insane whitewaters of Canada’s Stikine Canyon, flies above a boat with the water powered Jet Lev system, goes behind the scenes of Oakley’s Wave of the Winter featuring World Champion surfer Kelly Slater, and delves deep into a surf barrel via GoPro’s Ride of The Winter.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep108: Manatees and Dugongs In Danger
programme.desc: Each year, hundreds of critically endangered manatees are killed in U.S. waters by boats, disease and cold weather. 2006 was the worst year on record for manatee deaths – 416 animals perished. With only a few thousand remaining in the wild, mostly in heavily developed Florida wetlands, the clock is ticking in efforts to save this amazing mammal from extinction.

programme.title: Ride Snowboards Presents: Rough Around The Edges
programme.desc: Rough Around The Edges dives into 30 years of Ride Snowboards. Pow days, lawsuits, trespassing, wild decisions, and relentless innovation. A raw, honest look at the brand that shaped modern riding.

programme.title: Ride Snowboards Presents: Zero Chill
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Assisted Living
programme.desc: After watching Spencer Schubert’s part in the Torment snowboarding film, “Good Sport,” Mikey Leblanc found himself inspired to get back on the toboggan. One phone call later and the newly formed duo got to work filming "ASSISTED LIVING.” This short-film will have you icing your knees in no time.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Brighton Resort - Episode 01
programme.desc: In our latest MICRODOSE series we aim to explore the most influential resorts and iconic locations in snowboarding history, starting with—that’s right—Brighton Resort in Salt Lake City, Utah. Welcome to Brighton Resort Episode 1 of 5. For many riders young and old, Brighton Resort will forever be the epicenter of the snowboarding world. The plentiful snowfall, terrain parks, lift ops, cat drivers, mechanics, management, cafeteria, cooks, and mountain culture are all first class. Back in the early days, very few ski resorts were willing to take a chance on the newfound “lifestyle sport” of snowboarding, but Brighton took the leap. In doing so, Brighton made all the difference. Within a few years, hundreds of ski areas around the world came to see Brighton’s approach to snowboarding as the gold standard. From the biggest vacation destinations to the smallest trash heaps covered in fake snow, everyone (whether they’ve known it or not) has borrowed from the Brighton playbook. This has made it possible for millions of would-be snowboarders to make their first turns safely in-bounds via rope-tows, chairlifts, and gondola rides. Newbies need not traipse into the backcountry with no snow sense and little skill. For this we have Brighton to thank.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Bjorn Borg and John McEnroe have set new standards in men's tennis, while Mike Tyson and Evander Holyfield have reached new summits in heavyweight boxing. These two rivalries have created historic tensions.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Michael Jordan danced for the last time for the Chicago Bulls in 1998. Agnes Keleti dominated the Melbourne Olympic Games in 1956. And India stunned the world by carrying off the cricketing World Cup in 1983.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The 1999 French Open final between Martina Hingis and Steffi Graf and Michael Schumacher's 1995 season with Benetton have marked the history of sport.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Nobody has dominated a grand slam like Rafael Nadal in the French Open… and in 2017, he achieved what everyone thought impossible, in triumphing for the 10th time in the Roland-Garros stadium.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The flamboyant Flo-Jo opens the way to the Seoul Olympic Games in 1988 and Novak Djokovic jumps for joy at the French Open in 2023.

programme.title: Football Stars
programme.desc: Marcus Rashford, Andriy Shevchenko, the speediest players of the 2020 European Championship.

programme.title: Chill
programme.desc: Chill heads to the antipodes to do some water skiing with the men's Action Tricks Comp and the women's Ski Jump. We examine in detail the women's longboard championships in the South China sea.

programme.title: Sports Woman
programme.desc: In this edition of Sportswoman, we look at the athletes who have taken their own paths.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: When the world needed a hero, the Brown Bomber rose up and did what he had to do.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: FC Barcelona is the symbol of Catalan pride and footballing excellence.

programme.title: Karen on the Rock
programme.desc: The Monaco F1 Grand Prix is a notable date in the calendar of the stars. Karen goes around with her mike and introduces you to the greatest drivers: Button, Rosberg and, of course, her husband!

programme.title: Tomorrow Will Be Better
programme.desc: Czech freestyle motocross star Libor Podmol is proof that the wildest dreams come true. In January, 2010 he flies to the US, buys a Suzuki 250 two-stroke, becomes 6 times world champ and signs a sponsorship deal with Rockstar Energy.

programme.title: California Republic
programme.desc: No other place offers such endless freedom while fueling surfing's evolution. California's blue skies, green waters, and landscapes inspire millions worldwide and shape global culture.

programme.title: Peace and Left II
programme.desc: A Basque freesurfer documents a five-month journey through Indonesia, traveling with family, friends, and alone, capturing his surf adventure on camera.

programme.title: All Or Nothing
programme.desc: A self-supported project celebrating two-wheel sports, filmed across Europe, featuring young talents and world-class riders in MTB, trials, BMX, and motorsports.

programme.title: Because
programme.desc: A high-end freeski documentary following 22 professional athletes across record snowfall winters, facing deep powder, massive cliffs, and extreme expeditions, while sharing their ambition, discipline, and drive to reach the next level of their careers.

programme.title: The Kayak Man
programme.desc: Another expedition? You must be crazy.This is what Beppe's friend told him when he decided to leave for North America. Even after paddling in the biggest rivers in the world, his desire for adventure was still not satisfied, and he went out looking for more. Dreaming of freedom, sleeping bags and nature, he ventured into the unknown to discover the Yukon and Teslin Rivers.For those unaware, the Yukon river is the major watercourse of the northwest of North America. It flows through the Canadian Yukon Territory and makes it's way to Alaska. The Teslin River is a bit shorter, but not for this reason less fun to dive into. They both offer an impressive scenery amidst cold temperatures, dangerous whitewaters and the wild nature of North America.The Kayak Man takes us on a journey of self discovery through the most beautiful landscapes of Canada and the United States while following the path of a brave kayaker that leaves his life behind in an attempt to explore new horizons by himself. An impressive trip that will not leave him the same way he was before.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Cut Her Out
programme.desc: Darcy can't purge her mind of the animalistic abuse she suffered as a child at the hands of her mother. Darcy's therapist Ryan discovers that her family homestead has been abandoned.

programme.title: Death Mask
programme.desc: Wilbur works in an old carnival and shows some gruesome things to the puplic. He covered his face because he had a sadistic father who burned his face. Everybody makes jokes about his scars and when the new boss fired him, he go to an old swamp-witch who gives him a peace of wood from a hanging tree and Wilbur makes a mask from this piece of wood and put all his anger in this mask. When he puts the mask on, everybody who looks on this mask commits suicide. He has created the Death-Mask.

programme.title: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Tom Sizemore and Eric Roberts in this tense thriller about two FBI agents who track down a missing person's case which leads them to a group of stock brokers who hunt people for sport.

programme.title: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful, young woman out on the town with friends is saved from the clutches of a serial rapist by an ancient but gorgeous vampire, but at what cost?

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E08 - Hunting Sarajevo Snipers
programme.desc: The Bosnian War was an extraordinarily complex event, with many layers of military involvement including NATO forces, national militaries, irregular paramilitary forces, mujahedeen revolutionaries, private security companies, and international intelligence personnel. One tactic in particular struck fear into the hearts of the military and civilians alike: the use of snipers positioned in high buildings. This edition of CQB investigates this specific combat technique and how it was countered by opposing forces. Taking viewers inside a “sniper‘s den,” the program explains how this tactic was so successfully used by rebel forces – and how traditional military techniques evolved to combat it.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E03 - Bear In Focus
programme.desc: A group of conservationists are observing a family of black bears in the wooded hills of Oklahoma, and Ivan gets to meet them.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E04 - Aggressive Measures
programme.desc: Ivan goes to Mozambique to join an anti-poaching team that focuses on catching poachers and protecting at-risk animals.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E18 - The Queen Mother An Affectionate Tribute
programme.desc: The Queen Mother, who lived as long as the century itself, was a beloved figure in British life. She was a symbol of bravery during the Second World War and a timeless icon of steadiness, winning a deep affection from people that was only matched by the Queen herself.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E07 - Swoop and Scoop
programme.desc: Wiedie and Chris designed their lives so they can experience all Jackson Hole has to offer. And when a young snowmobiler's first ride into the backcountry spins out of control, they join forces with Jess and Flip to execute a perfect 'swoop and scoop' rescue.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E08 - No Short Cuts
programme.desc: Tim demands a lot of everyone around him, especially during a cave rescue, which he describes as the worst kind of rescue.

programme.desc: Wondering if you should give up because progress feels slow? Wisdom isn’t choosing what’s easiest, it’s choosing what’s worth it. If you’re tempted to quit because it’s hard, remember: God uses pressure and patience to prepare you for something greater.

programme.title: Not Something, But Someone

programme.title: Faith to Stay

programme.title: Stop Staring At That Stone
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed how two people can be looking at the same thing and have completely different perspectives on it? One might see a problem while the other sees a reason to praise. There might be something in your life that looks like a problem right now, but God is inviting you to pivot so you can see the truth.

programme.title: It Still Works
programme.desc: Pastor Steven showed us through the life of Moses how faith often looks like taking action even while you feel full of doubt. God can do miracles when we have the courage to look our doubt in the face and do it anyway.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Clara Inés talks on the phone with Cirilo. Raul inadvertently overhears when she mentions that her sister Bernice tried to commit suicide.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Responding to Israel's call, Clara Inés and Raúl become tense as they do not know what truth the man wants to talk to them about.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Adriana manages to take Tatianita away while Carlos Raul is left confronting the criminals to defend his mother.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raul is surprised when Ninoska appears before him with a child he claims to be his son.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Celso, unhinged, watches and mocks Fausto, who shoots at his lover's chest, who falls instantly. Fausto goes to his office, telling everyone that nothing happened. Camila, at the scene, tries to convince Patricia to flee because everything indicates that she is Celso's murderer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia, crying, denies having killed Celso. Fausto manipulates the children into believing that their mother is the killer and must turn herself in. Camila eloquently presents her version of events and then tells Ezequiel that he lied to make Patricia pay for a crime she didn't commit, just like they did with their mother.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Victoria Guanipa and Nicolás Del Casal say goodbye with an embrace after spending the night together sheltering from a strong storm when they are surprised by Florencia de Del Casal, who complains to her husband about his closeness with Victoria. Genara demands Hilario Guanipa to tell her where his wife Adelaida is, because she knows that he took her by force from their house. Florencia asks her husband to tell her what happened between him and Victoria while they were sheltering from the rain; although he assures her that he did not betray her, he considers that the best thing for them is to separate; however, she is not willing to give him a divorce. Hilario is told that something happened with Carlos Hansen and immediately goes to the town hospital to find out what happened; Felipe tells him that they had a traffic accident and that his boss had to be transferred to the capital because his condition is very delicate. Hilario takes Adelaida to his house; there Felipe, in front of Victoria and Genara, informs the lady that Hansen had an accident; Adelaida fears a misfortune.

programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel rechazado por Camila, la manipula con una nueva oferta de trabajo como asistente de su hija Julia y todo para tratar de conseguir su cercanía. Max, confía en el amor de Camila. Torrealba pide que unan esfuerzos para encontrar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante las intenciones de Ezequiel, Octavia y Marcelina agreden verbalmente a Camila. Max le propone y Camila duda pero accede a casarse con él. En una cena, Ezequiel reúne a sus hijos y Camila será la homenajeada especial.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En la cena, el tema principal será Rosa Blanco. Ezequiel dice que esa mujer fue una oportunista que enamoró y se aprovechó de su hermano menor, Leoncio. Astrid ofende agregando que fue una prostituta, culpable de la guerra entre las dos familias por su relación con Augusto Aragón y también con Leoncio López.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en saber sobre su relación familiar, piensa que pueda ser prima de Max. Ezequiel quiere despejar la duda de que podría ser su sobrina, interroga a la Madre Isabel que niega saberlo y también recurre a Marcelina que se lo confirma. Camila, protege a Chantal, una niña que vende flores.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel, insiste en que Rosa Blanco causará mucho daño a Camila. Poco lo que se sabe, sólo que por una llamada asegura que regresará para vengarse.

programme.title: Vecinos del Terror
programme.desc: Por accidente se les dispara un arma con el impacto matan al cuñado quien después regresa de ultratumba a cobrar venganza y ni la policía se escapa de la venganza de ultratumba

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños asesinatos están ocurriendo en la ciudad. Una investigadora de lo paranormal y un detective privado se dedican a indagar en el caso y lo que encontraran será algo que nunca imaginaron.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes. Después de varias muertes accidentales, la DEA y la policía se embarcan en una búsqueda inútil en busca de este jefe de la mafia. Damián comienza a derrotar a su competencia con la ayuda de su científico privado y un informante de la DEA. El hijo del alcalde Martínez (de Súper Cóndor) queda en coma tras consumir el nuevo medicamento. El alcalde Martínez vuela a Nueva York desde Perú para comenzar su propia investigación en busca de Damián y una cura. Todo parece sombrío para los agentes de la DEA, el alcalde Martínez y su hijo; hasta que llegue la ayuda. El Cóndor llega a Nueva York desde Perú para ayudar a revertir los efectos de esta nueva y brutal droga y llevar a Damián ante la justicia.

programme.title: Esposa de Vacaciones
programme.desc: Aprovechando la ausencia de su esposa, un hombre se sumerge en las tentaciones que ofrece el ciber espacio y conoce a una mujer casada. Ellos vivirán un romance idílico sin dimensionar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Aute Retrato
programme.desc: Recopilación de los mejores momentos de Luis Eduardo Aute en sus 50 años de carrera musical y artística. Un recorrido por sus distintas facetas creativas y sus bandas sonoras. Toda la vida el artista desvelada por un grupo de testigos, colaboradores y amigos que, a través de sus testimonios, demuestran el impacto que han tenido sus icónicas canciones sobre la actualidad musical.

programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
